items.title: State-backed attackers and commercial surveillance vendors repeatedly use the same exploits
items.summary: We’re sharing an update on suspected state-backed attacker APT29 and the use of exploits identical to those used by Intellexa and NSO.
items.executive_summary: We’re sharing an update on suspected state-backed attacker APT29 and the use of exploits identical to those used by Intellexa and NSO.
